statements.__comment: Reset: clear architecture fields from all containers in this cluster
statements.query: MATCH (cluster:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(c:KubernetesContainer) WHERE c.architecture IS NOT NULL OR c.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL OR c.architecture_source IS NOT NULL REMOVE c.architecture, c.architecture_normalized, c.architecture_source

statements.__comment: Set: stamp architecture from the scheduled node onto each container via Pod->RUNS_ON->Node
statements.query: MATCH (cluster:KubernetesCluster{id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(c:KubernetesContainer)<-[:CONTAINS]-(pod:KubernetesPod)-[:RUNS_ON]->(node:KubernetesNode) WHERE node.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL SET c.architecture = node.architecture, c.architecture_normalized = node.architecture_normalized, c.architecture_source = 'node_info'
